Announcing Fellowships for Open-Source Developers
Palantir
Follow
1 min read
·
Jun 10, 2019

224

TL;DR: Palantir is offering paid opportunities for open-source developers contributing to our OSS projects. Get in touch with oss-fellowship@palantir.com if you’re interested.

Press enter or click to view image in full size

As active contributors to and users of open-source software (OSS), we are excited to offer full-time or part-time opportunities for software developers interested in working on our open-source projects. We are looking for help with feature development, code reviews, documentation, and community engagement (think meet-ups, conferences, etc.). Our OSS projects span a wide range of topics (to name a few, Kubernetes internals, TypeScript linting, Python IDEs) and programming languages (Java, Go, TypeScript, Python).

Get Palantir’s stories in your inbox

Join Medium for free to get updates from this writer.

Subscribe

OSS fellowships are a new experiment for us and as such the parameters (e.g., number of hours, employment or contracting, location, duration, engagement mode, mentoring, compensation) are not yet set in stone. If you’re interested, please reach out to oss-fellowship@palantir.com. We look forward to working with you!
